sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a history of depression and has been taking Zoloft 50mg daily. He also has a history of hypertension, which is currently well-controlled with Lisinopril 5mg daily. He reports a stressful winter and spring, with some weight gain. He denies suicidal ideation or intent to harm others.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals clear lungs and a grade 2 systolic ejection murmur. Extremities are normal with no edema. An A1C was drawn.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient presents with depression and hypertension. His depression is being treated with Zoloft, and his hypertension is managed with Lisinopril.
